task: BUILD-PLAN v3 trinn 4B-2 - minimum structural contracts for secondary pages + surfaces
classification_rationale: Touches the shared Clubhouse navigation (app-shell chrome) and establishes the minimum contract for secondary pages. Per cross-cutting rule B this defaults to product-wide.
risk_rationale: App-code change is limited to: (1) converting six Clubhouse V3 nav icons from <div> to native <button type=button> with aria-label/aria-controls/aria-haspopup (existing onclick handlers preserved), and (2) a narrowly scoped CSS reset (button.chd-box only) restoring visual parity plus a :focus-visible outline. No behaviour, layout math, background images, positions, component order or data flow changed. Tests + docs are otherwise inert. Worst realistic case is a failing test.
changed_files_note: CONTRACT-REGISTER.md is listed LAST and is only updated after the local tests are actually green. It is not written in this step.

app_code_change_detail.app_js: renderClubhouseDashboard(): 6 icon boxes <div class=chd-box ch-tap> -> <button type=button class=chd-box ch-tap>. Side icons (Rounds/Rivals/Trophies/Approvals) get aria-label + aria-controls=tab-<root>. Modal icons (Insights/Handicap) get aria-label + aria-haspopup=dialog + aria-controls=modal-bg. onclick handlers unchanged. #modal-bg and #modal markup NOT touched.
app_code_change_detail.styles_css: Scoped reset for button.chd-box only (appearance/margin/padding/border/background-color:transparent/color/font/line-height/text-align:inherit) + button.chd-box:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--gold); outline-offset:2px; border-radius:6px }. No global button reset. No hard-coded gold fallback.

activation_policy: Real, visible user interaction only, selected by role + accessible name (getByRole). Enter for Rounds, Space for Rivals, click for the rest. Never inline onclick, never window.activateTab, never a V3-specific class name.
determinism: seedEmptyState for all (clean, logged-out storage). No production data, no network, no Supabase. seedRoundState was removed with the Stats test (Stats entry is dead code; see finding S).
scope_decision: 4B-2 grants a green contract ONLY to user journeys that are actually reachable and deterministic now (empty, logged-out state). Profile/Settings (finding R) and Stats (finding S) are not, and are dropped from 4B-2 rather than contracted with an assumption that does not hold. No orphaned-guard is added for Stats: asserting Stats stays unreachable would lock today's broken behavior and turn a later fix into a test failure.

expected_test_count.note: 6 contracts = Rounds, Rivals, Trophies, Approvals (icon pages) + Insights, Handicap (modal surfaces). Profile/Settings/Stats dropped (findings R, S).

evidence_requirements.screenshot: REQUIRED (manual/local): Chromium 390/412 + WebKit 390/412 visual parity of the icon row vs the pre-change <div> version - same position/size/backgrounds, no UA border/padding/background, no layout shift, focus-visible not clipped. NOT yet run; do not claim pixel parity before it is.

product_findings.solved_in_4b2: role, accessible name, keyboard focus and native Enter/Space activation for all six icons (Rounds, Rivals, Trophies, Insights, Approvals, Handicap) via native <button aria-label>.
product_findings.not_solved_in_4b2: See finding Q - accessibility inside the shared modal architecture is out of scope.

product_findings.finding: The shared modal container lacks a correct dialog role and an accessible name. Focus is not documented to move into the modal on open; focus return to the trigger on close is not documented; a focus trap is missing or not documented.
product_findings.decision: NOT solved in 4B-2. Deliberately no half modal refactor. The buttons advertise the modal via aria-haspopup=dialog and aria-controls=modal-bg, but full modal a11y (role/dialog, aria-modal with real focus management, focus trap, accessible name) is a separate step.

product_findings.finding: The visible Insights icon opens openAdvancedInsights() (a modal), not #tab-insights. #tab-insights is only reachable via renderClubhouseInsightsPreview(), which returns '' immediately (dead code).
product_findings.decision: The actual user surface (the modal) is contracted as a secondary surface. #tab-insights stays BLOCKED/orphaned; no false page contract.

product_findings.finding: No activateTab('courses') call anywhere; no visible entry. The page renders but no user can reach it. The More menu that could expose it is permanently display:none.
product_findings.decision: BLOCKED/orphaned. No contract, no new user path in 4B-2. Keep/remove decided separately.

product_findings.finding: #tabs-more has inline style=display:none which overrides the CSS media-query rule, so the eight hidden nav buttons have no visible path.

Both pages are cloud-gated. openProfileMenu (app.js:2581-2582) only builds the player-card menu when window.fairwayCloud.isLoggedIn() is true; logged-out it returns openAuthModal(), so the profile chip opens the authentication flow, not the profile menu. The native <button>Edit profile</button> / <button>Settings</button> (app.js:2619-2620) that call activateTab('profile'|'settings') only render for a logged-in user. The buttons are proper native buttons with correct accessible names and handlers - this is NOT an accessibility defect.
product_findings.decision: BLOCKED in 4B-2: neither page is reachable in the empty, logged-out state the suite runs in. Dropped from 4B-2 (not contracted with a false logged-in assumption). Moves to trinn 5 once a deterministic authenticated fixture is established.

product_findings.finding: #tab-stats is orphaned. renderDashboard (app.js:3689) returns at line 3698 (V3 path) before the legacy block, so renderYourGame (app.js:3940, only called from the dead line 3719), the #dash-your-game visibility toggle (3712) and the only Stats entry - the 'Full stats -> ' link with activateTab('stats') (3973) - are all dead code. #dash-your-game is never shown or populated regardless of rounds, and activateTab('stats') is never invoked from any live path. Seeding a finished round does NOT make Stats reachable.
product_findings.decision: BLOCKED/orphaned. The conditional-reachability contract was removed. No orphaned-guard is added: asserting Stats stays unreachable would lock the current broken behavior and make a later repair a test failure. Product decision to repair or remove #tab-stats is taken separately.

page_status.Profile: BLOCKED - cloud-gated (finding R), moves to trinn 5
page_status.Settings: BLOCKED - cloud-gated (finding R), moves to trinn 5
page_status.Stats: BLOCKED/orphaned - dead entry (finding S), no contract, no orphaned-guard
page_status.Insights (#tab-insights): BLOCKED/orphaned - modal covered separately as a surface
